Live 2025
Easter 2026 — It Happened

What If
Breakthrough
You Missed

On April 5th, 2026, over 7,000 people packed the UW-Milwaukee Panther Arena and encountered the presence of God in a way Milwaukee has never seen. Worship filled the arena. Lives were transformed. Souls came to Christ. This was Easter at The Panther. Don't miss what God is going to do next year.

"He is Risen."
